items.headline: Leadoff history! McCarthy's inside-the-park HR feat hadn't happened in nearly 100 years

news_items.headline: Cease, 10 AL relievers silence NL in 15-K shutout
news_items.summary: Starting pitcher Dylan Cease combined with 10 relievers in a dominant three-hit, 15-strikeout shutout of the National League in a 4-0 win in Tuesday night's All-Star Game.

news_items.headline: AL 3B Caminero hit by pitch, exits in 3rd inning
news_items.summary: In the third inning of Tuesday's All-Star Game, Cardinals reliever Riley O'Brien hit Rays third baseman Junior Caminero on the left hand with a 97.6 mph sinker. Though the 23-year-old star went right into the AL clubhouse, X-rays came back negative.

news_items.headline: Reports: No. 1 pick Cholowsky gets record bonus
news_items.summary: Roch Cholowsky, the No. 1 pick in the MLB draft, has reportedly agreed to a contract with the White Sox that includes a record-breaking $10.35M signing bonus.

news_items.headline: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
news_items.summary: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB in LA28 facing hurdles with MLBPA
news_items.summary: Though support is growing for MLB to participate in the Olympics in 2028, it's complicated by disagreements with the MLBPA, according to sources.

news_items.headline: Walker hopes Derby win stirs Black kids to play
news_items.summary: Cardinals outfielder Jordan Walker wants to be a role model, and he hopes his victory in the Home Run Derby inspires more Black kids to play baseball.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Ohtani will be available against Yankees
news_items.summary: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts says Shohei Ohtani will "be in the lineup" for this weekend's series against the Yankees in the Bronx after having fluid drained from his left knee.

news_items.headline: Behind the scenes of a franchise-defining moment: ...
news_items.summary: Roch Cholowsky or Grady Emerson? Here's how the White Sox's discussion played out hours before the 2026 draft began.

news_items.headline: Wednesday Morning Links
news_items.summary: Morning, all! Evan Grant hosted a fan Q&A with Jacob Latz, where we learn about Ranger bullpen hijinx and how his number was 67 before that was a thing. Latz had a custom liner made for his red carpet suit jacket featuring pictures of his family. Latz went from missing out on the Rangers’ fifth […]

news_items.headline: Foster Griffin showed the baseball world what Washington Nationals fans have seen all season
news_items.summary: Foster Griffin’s fairytale return to MLB continued with a 1-2-3 inning in the All-Star game with two strikeouts

news_items.headline: Legends at the Astrodome: 1986 All Star Game: Frank White
news_items.summary: On this very day 40 years ago, The Houston Astrodome would play host to the 57th annual All-Star Game. Royals Second Baseman Frank White would ultimately score the deciding run that night and he’s our featured guest at The Crawfish Boxes. Q: You were no stranger to All-Star Games, and your career spanned eras […]
